title: Secure Multi-Factor Enrollment Portal

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Secure Multi-Factor Enrollment Portal

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <text x='20' y='30' fill='#C06C88' fontSize='24' textAnchor='start'>Multi-Factor Enrollment</text>
  <rect x='25' y='60' width='150' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD' fillOpacity='0.5'/>
  <text x='35' y='75' fill='#411C56' fontSize='18' textAnchor='start'>Enter Phone Number</text>
  <text x='35' y='110' fill='#411C56' fontSize='18' textAnchor='start'>+1 (123) 456-7890</text>
  <rect x='25' y='140' width='150' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD' fillOpacity='0.5'/>
  <text x='35' y='155' fill='#411C56' fontSize='18' textAnchor='start'>Verify via SMS</text>
  <rect x='170' y='60' width='150' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD' fillOpacity='0.5'/>
  <text x='180' y='75' fill='#411C56' fontSize='18' textAnchor='start'>Scan QR Code</text>
  <rect x='170' y='140' width='150' height='40' rx='5' fill='#B7D7CD' fillOpacity='0.5'/>
  <text x='180' y='155' fill='#411C56' fontSize='18' textAnchor='start'>Next Step</text>
  <rect x='220' y='200' width='80' height='40' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/>
  <text x='230' y='215' fill='#C06C88' fontSize='18' textAnchor='start'>Submit</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must display a countdown timer and a progress bar
Must handle user input for phone number and QR code scanning

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Secure Multi-Factor Enrollment Portal

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
